debug_info.goal:
D : Type u_1
C : Type u_2
E : Type u_3
CC : Category C
CD : Category D
CE : Category E
F : @CategoryInContext.Functor D C CD CC
G : @CategoryInContext.Functor E C CE CC
X✝ Y✝ Z✝ :
  (d : D) × (e : E) × Hom (@CategoryInContext.Functor.F D C CD CC F d) (@CategoryInContext.Functor.F E C CE CC G e)
f : Hom X✝ Y✝
g : Hom Y✝ Z✝
⊢ (@CategoryInContext.Comma_category_dom.match_1 D C E CC CD CE F G X✝ Z✝
      (fun x =>
        Hom (@CategoryInContext.Comma_category.match_1 D C E CC CD CE F G (fun x => D) X✝ fun X fst snd => X)
          (@CategoryInContext.Comma_category.match_1 D C E CC CD CE F G (fun x => D) Z✝ fun X fst snd => X))
      (@comp
        ((d : D) ×
          (e : E) × Hom (@CategoryInContext.Functor.F D C CD CC F d) (@CategoryInContext.Functor.F E C CE CC G e))
        (@CategoryInContext.Comma_category D C E CC CD CE F G) X✝ Y✝ Z✝ f g)
      fun hk property => hk.1) =
    comp
      (@CategoryInContext.Comma_category_dom.match_1 D C E CC CD CE F G X✝ Y✝
        (fun x =>
          Hom (@CategoryInContext.Comma_category.match_1 D C E CC CD CE F G (fun x => D) X✝ fun X fst snd => X)
            (@CategoryInContext.Comma_category.match_1 D C E CC CD CE F G (fun x => D) Y✝ fun X fst snd => X))
        f fun hk property => hk.1)
      (@CategoryInContext.Comma_category_dom.match_1 D C E CC CD CE F G Y✝ Z✝
        (fun x =>
          Hom (@CategoryInContext.Comma_category.match_1 D C E CC CD CE F G (fun x => D) Y✝ fun X fst snd => X)
            (@CategoryInContext.Comma_category.match_1 D C E CC CD CE F G (fun x => D) Z✝ fun X fst snd => X))
        g fun hk property => hk.1)

proof:
cases f <;> cases g <;>
      simp_all [comp]
    <;>
      (try rfl) <;>
      (try simp_all [comp]) <;>
      (try rfl) <;>
      (try simp_all [Category.comp_assoc]) <;>
      (try rfl)
failed_attempts:
simp_all [comp_left]
            <;> try simp_all [comp_right]
            <;> try simp_all [comp_middle]
            <;> try simp_all [comp_assoc]
            <;> try simp_all [comp_left]
            <;> try simp_all [comp_right]
            <;> try simp_all [comp_middle]

trivial) <;>
      (try simp_all [Unit.ext_iff]) <;>
      (try contradiction) <;>
      (try norm_num)
      <;>
      (try
        {
          exfalso
          simp_all [Unit.ext_iff]
          <;> contradiction
        })
    -- Use the constructed scenario to prove the theorem
    exact ⟨α, β, C, D, F, h₁⟩
  -- Use the constructed scenario to prove the theorem
  obtain ⟨α, β, C, D, F, X, Y, Z, f, g, f', g', h⟩ := h
  refine' ⟨α, β, C, D, F, X, Y, Z, f, g, f', _⟩
  refine' ⟨g', _⟩
  intro h₁
  -- Derive a contradiction from the given scenario
  have h₂ := h h₁
  exfalso
  apply h₂
  <;>
  (try trivial) <;>
  (try simp_all [Unit.ext_iff]) <;>
  (try contradiction) <;>
  (try norm_num)
  <;>
  (try
    {
      exfalso
      simp_all [Unit.ext_iff]
      <;> contradiction
    })

dsimp [Comma_category, Comma_category_dom, Prod.ext_iff]
    <;>
    (try decide) <;>
    (try simp_all [Function.comp, Category.comp, Prod.mk.injEq]) <;>
    (try aesop) <;>
    (try
      {
        ext <;>
        simp_all [Function.comp, Category.comp, Prod.mk.injEq] <;>
        (try decide) <;>
        (try aesop) <;>
        (try rfl)
      })

by
    dsimp [comp]
    <;>
    (try cases' ‹_› with hk hk <;> cases' ‹_› with p p <;> simp_all [map_comp]) <;>
    (try ext <;> simp_all [map_comp]) <;>
    (try aesop)

--todo: how to refactor the comma category type to avoid spelling it out.
def Comma_category_dom {D C E : Type*} [CC : Category C] [CD : Category D] [CE : Category E]
    (F : Functor D C) (G : Functor E C) :
    Functor (Σ (d : D) (e : E), Category.Hom (F.F d) (G.F e)) D where
  F := fun ⟨X, _, _⟩ => X
  homF := fun ⟨hk, _⟩ => hk.1
  map_id X := by sorry
  map_comp f g := by sorry

intro X Y Z f g
    simp_all [Comma_category_comp]
    <;>
    (try simp_all [F.map_comp, G.map_comp])
    <;>
    (try aesop)

simp_all [F.map_id, G.map_id]) <;>
    (try simp_all [assoc, id_comp, comp_id]) <;>
    (try aesop) <;>
    (try rfl)
    <;>
    (try
      {
        simp_all [comp]
        <;>
        (try aesop)
        <;>
        (try rfl)
      })
    <;>
    (try
      {
        simp_all [F.map_comp, G.map_comp, comp]
        <;>
        (try aesop)
        <;>
        (try rfl)
      })
    <;>
    (try
      {
        simp_all [assoc]
        <;>
        (try aesop)
        <;>
        (try rfl)
      })

simp_all [G.map_comp])
        <;>
        (try aesop)
      })
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Combine.map_assoc])
    <;>
    (try aesop)
    <;>
    (try
      {
        simp_all [F.map_comp, G.map_comp]
        <;>
        rw [assoc]
        <;>
        aesop
      })

dsimp [Comma_category_dom] at *
    <;> simp_all [Prod.ext_iff, Function.comp_apply]
    <;>
    (try
      {
        aesop
      })
    <;>
    (try
      {
        simp_all [F.map_comp, G.map_comp]
        <;> aesop
      })
  
  id_comp := by
    dsimp [Comma_category_dom]
    <;> simp [Prod.ext_iff, Function.comp_apply]
    <;>
    (try
      {
        aesop
      })
    <;>
    (try
      {
        simp_all [F.map_id, G.map_id]
        <;> aesop
      })
  
  comp_id := by
    dsimp [Comma_category_dom]
    <;> simp [Prod.ext_iff, Function.comp_apply]
    <;>
    (try
      {
        aesop
      })
    <;>
    (try
      {
        simp_all [F.map_id, G.map_id]
        <;> aesop
      })
  
  assoc := by
    dsimp [Comma_category_dom]
    <;> simp [Prod.ext_iff, Function.comp_apply]
    <;>
    (try
      {
        aesop
      })
    <;>
    (try
      {
        simp_all [F.map_comp, G.map_comp]
        <;> aesop
      })
successful_attempts:
cases f <;> cases g <;>
      simp_all [comp]
    <;>
      (try rfl) <;>
      (try simp_all [comp]) <;>
      (try rfl) <;>
      (try simp_all [Category.comp_assoc]) <;>
      (try rfl)

simp [comp]
    <;>
    simp_all [Subtype.ext_iff]
    <;>
    refine' congr_arg (fun x => x.1) _
    <;>
    simp [comp]
